.github/workflows/maven-publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 for the Maven Central repository setup job.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 instead of Java 11 to match the target JDK version.

maven-plugin/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
maven-plugin/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for javax.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were removed from the JDK in Java 11 and are no longer available in Java 17 without an explicit dependency.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace traditional instanceof check with pattern matching to eliminate explicit casting.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.before: if (element instanceof Rule) { return prettify((Rule) element); }
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.after: if (element instanceof Rule rule) { return prettify(rule); }

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 features and constraints.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 17 or lack support for newer language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled with Java 17 due to bytecode version incompatibilities.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation package in Java 17.
server/pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 17+ as it was removed from the JDK.

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.general_idea: Replace manual cast with pattern matching instanceof to leverage Java 16+ language feature.
server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.after:
if (elementInstance instanceof DrgElement element) {
            return element;

validators/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation package in Java 17.
validators/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 17; code using these annotations will fail to compile without the explicit Jakarta dependency.

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner variable extraction.
validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.after: if (sourceElement instanceof Decision sourceDecision && targetElement instanceof Decision targetDecision) {

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace the explicit filter-and-map pattern for Optional with the more concise flatMap(Optional::stream) idiom.

validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Migrate string concatenation to text blocks for improved readability.
validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.before: final String expectedErrorMessage = "Could not parse '[1..': line 1, column 5:\n" + "INTEGER, DECIMAL, booleanfragment, variablefragment, stringfragment or date and time(\" expected, EOF encountered.";
